description: The VideoImportDialog component is better explained in the Importing page.

fields._videoType: The type of video being imported.
fields._stereoLayout: The kind of video stereo layout the video being imported has.
fields._depthPreset: The kind of depth the video being imported has.

methods.OpenRoot: Handles when the dialog is opened to the root menu.
methods.Preset_StereoVideo: Imports as a default stereo video.
methods.MenuStereoLayout: Switches the menu to show the stereo options.
methods.Preset_HorizontalLR: Imports the video as a stereo horizontal Left Right layout.
methods.Preset_HorizontalRL: Imports the video as a stereo horizontal Right Left layout.
methods.Preset_VerticalLR: Imports the video as a stereo vertical Left Right layout.
methods.Preset_VerticalRL: Imports the video as a stereo vertical Right Left layout.
methods.MenuDepthPreset: Switches the menu to show the depth options.
methods.Preset_DepthPFCapture: Uses the PF capture vertical depth option.
methods.Preset_DepthPFCaptureHorizontal: Uses the PF capture horizontal depth option.
methods.AsRawFile: Imports the video as a raw file.
methods.Return: Navigates the menu to the previous menu.
